query: ALTER TABLE league_matches ADD COLUMN white_report VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT NULL, ADD COLUMN black_report VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT NULL, ADD COLUMN white_reported_at TIMESTAMP NULL DEFAULT NULL, ADD COLUMN black_reported_at TIMESTAMP NULL DEFAULT NULL; ALTER TABLE league_weeks ADD COLUMN deadline TIMESTAMP NULL DEFAULT NULL;
